Privacy Policy

Website: CalcHub

Last updated: May 19, 2026

CalcHub is committed to protecting your privacy. Our calculators are designed to work without accounts, without ads, and without collecting personal information. This policy explains what we do (and do not) collect when you use our website.

1. Introduction

CalcHub provides free online calculators for everyday decisions. We aim to keep the experience fast, simple, and privacy-friendly. We do not require registration and we do not ask you to provide personal details to use the tools.

2. What We Do NOT Collect

No account or registration is required.

No calculation inputs or results are stored.

No personal data is sold to third parties.

All calculations happen in your browser only.

3. What We May Collect Automatically

We may collect anonymous page view data to understand overall usage (for example: which pages are popular, and whether the site is performing well).

Browser type and device type (in an aggregated, anonymous form).

No personal identification should be possible from this data.

This may be collected via Google Analytics configured in anonymous mode.

4. Cookies Policy

We use minimal analytics cookies only (if analytics is enabled).

No advertising cookies.

No personal tracking cookies.

You can disable cookies in your browser settings. Most browsers allow you to block cookies entirely, clear cookies, or limit third-party cookies.

5. Third Party Services

Google Analytics — anonymous traffic data only (if enabled).

Exchange rate API — used by our currency converter to fetch exchange rates. No personal data is sent.

Google Fonts — used for font delivery only.

6. Childrens Privacy

CalcHub is safe for all ages.

We do not knowingly collect data from children.

7. Policy Changes

We may update this policy occasionally to reflect improvements or changes to the website. Please check this page for the latest version.

8. Contact

If you have privacy questions, contact us at privacy@calchub.com.
